description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in a formal business suit, complete with a collared shirt and a patterned necktie. The suit jacket is tailored and features lapels, buttons on the cuffs, and matching trousers. The figure's shoes are formal and pointed, complementing the professional attire. The individual has neatly styled, short hair that is combed back, giving a polished appearance. The hands are relaxed and open, with no visible accessories or carried items. The overall look is that of a well-groomed professional, suitable for urban business environments.
description: A well-dressed adult male in a formal business suit with a collared shirt, necktie, and formal shoes, featuring neatly styled short hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full suit, patterned tie, collared shirt, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the suit's fit, and the formal shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the suit jacket, trousers, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, suit details, and shoe style.
attribute_clothing_type: business suit with collared shirt and necktie
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
